lessons: Lancer (spear) killed you in 3 of last 5 rounds — avoid open areas and linear paths; spear sightings >80 in 4 of last 6 rounds.
Bow users (Deadeye, GhostProtocol) killed you in 2 of last 2 rounds with bow — never engage at medium range; bow is your deadliest counterweapon.
Sword users are your most killable targets (7 kills in last 5 rounds) — prioritize isolated sword users, especially when unshielded and away from walls.
Daggers have 0 wins in 5 of last 6 rounds and were outperformed even by sword users — abandon daggers unless double_bounty is active.
Shredder (daggers) killed you in a 1v1 duel in round 210 — avoid close-quarters duels with same-weapon opponents; they outmaneuver you in tight spaces.
Staff has 22 wins in 133 rounds (highest win rate) — return to staff when bow fails or shield-heavy meta emerges.
insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Staff has the highest win rate (22/133) in history and outperformed bow in recent rounds despite bow's high enemy prevalence.
